title: Žilina、Žilina Region — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Žilina、Žilina Regionの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

ŽilinaはŽilina Regionにある人口82,656の都市です。A key transport hub in northwestern Slovakia, surrounded by the Malá Fatra mountains, with a charming old town and a growing automotive industry.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
